name: XpCade
short_description: Play virtual arcade machines, and program them using a new programming language. Go out explore, edit and play mission maps.
detailed_description: You start in a first person 'Doom like' player. You are in a garage with some arcade machines. You can go near them and play different mini games. You can also leave the garage and have a look around. In the garage there is an old terminal that is able to change the program of the arcades and add new one. Terminal runs a new programming language, I called 'Adapter' you can find some documentation in the terminal and in the website spacespacesoftware.com.
about_the_game: You start in a first person 'Doom like' player. You are in a garage with some arcade machines. You can go near them and play different mini games. You can also leave the garage and have a look around. In the garage there is an old terminal that is able to change the program of the arcades and add new one. Terminal runs a new programming language, I called 'Adapter' you can find some documentation in the terminal and in the website spacespacesoftware.com.
